main.description: Pause and dive into collections of symbolic illustrations and paintings that capture the energy of the present moment, alongside original tattoo art, murals, and more.
main.description2: Immerse yourself in the visual language of the heart, soul, and presence amid a fast-moving world....

books.title: Color Studies
books.description: A set of color and texture studies for canvas concepts.

books.title: Portrait Drafts
books.description: Early portrait sketches with mood exploration.

books.title: Ink Motifs
books.description: Linework motifs for sleeve and backpiece ideas.

books.title: Flash Set A
books.description: Flash collection focused on contrast and symbols.

books.title: Pattern Lab
books.description: Repeating organic patterns for fabric trials.

books.title: Wax Process
books.description: Process notes on wax resist and dye layers.

books.title: Wall Concepts
books.description: Large wall composition blocks and color notes.

books.title: Site Mockups
books.description: Placement mockups adapted to different spaces.
